ITEM.name: Red Batton
ITEM.desc: Fear is instantly in the eyes of the enemy when you take your training dagger into battle.

ITEM.name: Stone Dagger
ITEM.desc: Created by DaFrag

ITEM.name: Antique Dagger
ITEM.desc: A customized jambiya type dagger. This dagger cost a fortune due to the its royalty and that it is 100% hand-made.

ITEM.name: Axium Knife
ITEM.desc: Brutal knife designed purely for anti-personnel combat purpose. It has high attack damage and broad area of defense but relatively weak penetration power.

ITEM.name: Imperial Knife
ITEM.desc: A knife used by imperials.

ITEM.name: Ghostly Kukri
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui.

ITEM.name: Ladder Dagger
ITEM.desc: Q LADDER GOGOGO! Created by Ennui.

ITEM.name: Pact Keeper
ITEM.desc: Contributed by NirDine

ITEM.name: Large Training Sword
ITEM.desc: Great Swords are outlawed in both The Axium Empire and the Republic of Travia, but can still be used in training.

ITEM.name: Shinai Sword
ITEM.desc: Fear is instantly in the eyes of the enemy when you take your training sword into battle.

ITEM.name: Abyssal Sword
ITEM.desc: A great sword.

ITEM.name: General's Blade
ITEM.desc: Ennui stole this from an old man with a pegleg.

ITEM.name: Veteran Soldier's Katana
ITEM.desc: This soldier’s sword is quite efficient and will give you an edge on the competition. Constructed from only the highest quality materials, it is solidly strong and usually supplied to veteran soldiers.

ITEM.name: Umbrella
ITEM.desc: This katana, shaped like an umbrella, is a limited edition weapon created for high-level hunters. It is of the highest quality and will certainly come in handy on your missions.

ITEM.name: Saber
ITEM.desc: A lightweight Saber standard for fighters in the Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Stylish Bat
ITEM.desc: A stylish black and gold bat the kids would use on the streets of the Travia Republic.

ITEM.name: Red Spiked Bat
ITEM.desc: A much more dangerous bat with spikes and blades.

ITEM.name: Steel Bat
ITEM.desc: A typical bat the kids would use on the streets of the Travia Republic.

ITEM.name: Dark Cutlass
ITEM.desc: A cutlass properly shaped for slicing through your enemies.

ITEM.name: Iris Katana
ITEM.desc: Modified by NirDine

ITEM.name: Hibiscus Katana
ITEM.desc: Modified by NirDine

ITEM.name: Ghostly Shura
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: Crusader Sword
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: Musashi
ITEM.desc: Created by Rain and Ennui

ITEM.name: Pipe
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: iGunZ Sword
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: Dragon Slayer
ITEM.desc: Created by Voaks

ITEM.name: Mitsuri Katana
ITEM.desc: Created by Eros and Ennui

ITEM.name: Nito Shinai
ITEM.desc: Fear is instantly in the eyes of the enemy when you take your training kodachis into battle.

ITEM.name: Golden Dragon Kodachis
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Black Ivory Kodachis
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Demonic Kodachis
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Eagle Eye Revolvers
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Silver Raptor Revolvers
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Tiger Teeth Revolvers
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Coffin Sub-Machine Guns
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Striker Sub-Machine Guns
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Finalizer
ITEM.desc: Courtesy of AsiaGunZ

ITEM.name: Golden Finalizer
ITEM.desc: Courtesy of AsiaGunZ

ITEM.name: Korean Breaker
ITEM.desc: Only OG kgunz players know. Didn't get the others to work so far...

ITEM.name: Lightning Thor
ITEM.desc: Courtesy of AsiaGunZ

ITEM.name: Cruelizon Limited
ITEM.desc: Limited edition of Cruelizon with unique color which is no longer in production and became a valued premium among the collectors.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Shotgun Limited
ITEM.desc: Limited edition of Iron Crow shotgun with unique color which is no longer in production and became a valued premium among the collectors.

ITEM.name: Steampunk Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Created by DaFrag.

ITEM.name: Electroneer
ITEM.desc: GIMME THE JUICE! Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: Golden Hydra
ITEM.desc: a Hydra shotgun, but golden.

ITEM.name: Ballistic Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Metal-plated Breaker
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Defender808
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Red Defender808
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Desert Breaker
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Ghostly Pioneer
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: MarlowX
ITEM.desc: Created by Rain and Ennui.

ITEM.name: Lotus Breaker
ITEM.desc: (insert description here) Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: A-9 Iconoclast
ITEM.desc: Adam Industrial’s latest military rocket launcher packs so much punch it can obliterate buildings, vehicles, barricades - even hopes and dreams. Because of its high production cost, only elite fortune-hunters can afford the A-9, but those lucky few are sure to get their money's worth.

ITEM.name: Bat BOOM
ITEM.desc: Happy Halloween!

ITEM.name: Afro Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: A brown afro wig.

ITEM.name: Foxmask (Men)
ITEM.desc: Japanese styled Foxmask, wear it for fun! Created by DaFrag.

ITEM.name: Eskimo Fur Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A fur hat worn by Eskimo hunters from the Artic region of Northern Astra. This thick fur hat is great for keeping warm, but more importantly it's heavy on defense.

ITEM.name: Axium Hitman Hair (Men)
ITEM.desc: Man’s wig for the formal meeting of the Axium hitmen, who are the best assassins of underworld for never missing the target and leaving no trace.

ITEM.name: Afro Wig (Women)
ITEM.desc: A brown afro wig.

ITEM.name: Eskimo Fur Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: A fur hat worn by Eskimo hunters from the Artic region of Northern Astra. This thick fur hat is great for keeping warm, but more importantly it's heavy on defense.

ITEM.name: Axium Hitman Hair (Women)
ITEM.desc: Woman’s wig for the formal meeting of the Axium hitmen, who are the best assassins of underworld for never missing the target and leaving no trace.

ITEM.name: Straw Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: Royal Guard Hair (Women)
ITEM.desc: Very Posh.

ITEM.name: Brimstone Apostle Headpiece (Women)
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Valentine's Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: Contributed by NirDine.

ITEM.name: Flutterfarer's Tricorn (Women)
ITEM.desc: This hat signifies a member of the infamous band of swashbucklers whose vessel can often be found distributing stolen goods to the less fortunate residents of Port. Their butterfly insignia represents change, and is instantly recognizable as a symbol of hope to anyone who calls the sea their home. Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: Nappy Cat Head (Women)
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui :3

ITEM.name: Lotus Cap (Women)
ITEM.desc: Modified by Ennui

ITEM.name: Xian Tactical Assassin Mask (Men)
ITEM.desc: Highly customized worn by the Xian Tactical Assassin Unit (XTA). Their unit is recognized for their high moral conviction and swift execution of a higher law, earning them the title: The Shadows of Justice

ITEM.name: Xian Tactical Assassin Mask (Women)
ITEM.desc: Highly customized worn by the Xian Tactical Assassin Unit (XTA). Their unit is recognized for their high moral conviction and swift execution of a higher law, earning them the title: The Shadows of Justice

ITEM.name: Valkyrie Headset (Men)
ITEM.desc: Valkyrie Set for the adventurers who are active even during harsh winter. It is flexible enough for outdoor activity and keeps warmth.

ITEM.name: Valkyrie Headset (Women)
ITEM.desc: Valkyrie Set for the adventurers who are active even during harsh winter. It is flexible enough for outdoor activity and keeps warmth.

ITEM.name: Magician Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: A hat worn by the disciples of Ramitz during the renaissance of forgotten magic flourished by Ramitz.

ITEM.name: Magician Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A felted hat worn by the disciples of Ramitz during the renaissance of forgetting magic flourished by Ramitz.

ITEM.name: THUG Hair (Women)
ITEM.desc: A wig worn by the members of the Travia Republics famous gang, the Travian Heathen Underground.

ITEM.name: THUG Beanie (Men)
ITEM.desc: A beanie worn by the members of the Travia Republics famous gang, the Travian Heathen Underground.

ITEM.name: Junior Hipster Wig (Women)
ITEM.desc: Casual hair for the hipsters of the Hunter Alliance. It provides excellent defense but is suprisingly heavy.

ITEM.name: Junior Hipster Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Casual hair for the hipsters of the Hunter Alliance. It provides excellent defense but is suprisingly heavy.

ITEM.name: Shark Teeth Bicorne (Women)
ITEM.desc: A Bicorne of the Empire navys worst enemy ,the Shark Teeth, who had power over the Astra ocean. They have made the people of sea tremble with fear with their ferociousness and cruelty.

ITEM.name: Shark Teeth Tricorne (Men)
ITEM.desc: A Tricorne of the Empire navys worst enemy ,the Shark Teeth, who had power over the Astra ocean. They have made the people of sea tremble with fear with their ferociousness and cruelty.

ITEM.name: Black Dragon Clan Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: A wig for members of the Black Dragon Clan, an alliance of merchants and hunters who have risen to fight against the tyranny of the corrupt Establishment.

ITEM.name: Black Dragon Clan Wig (Women)
ITEM.desc: A wig for members of the Black Dragon Clan, an alliance of merchants and hunters who have risen to fight against the tyranny of the corrupt Establishment.

ITEM.name: Crusader Helmet (Women)
ITEM.desc: A set worn by those who dedicated themselves as Knights. These brave Knights swore allegiance to those who shared common beliefs and a common faith.

ITEM.name: Crusader Helmet (Men)
ITEM.desc: A set worn by those who dedicated themselves as Knights. These brave Knights swore allegiance to those who shared common beliefs and a common faith.

ITEM.name: Tactical Ninja Mask (Women)
ITEM.desc: A mask for the Tactical Ninja, a special combat group that has been secretly working for the Republic for Travia from a remote location.

ITEM.name: Tactical Ninja Mask (Men)
ITEM.desc: A mask for the Tactical Ninja, a special combat group that has been secretly working for the Republic for Travia from a remote location.

ITEM.name: Kung Fu Wig (Women)
ITEM.desc: Kung fu wig that carries the soul of a legendary Kung fu fighter which makes one feel like a Kung fu master.

ITEM.name: Kung Fu Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Kung fu wig that carries the soul of a legendary Kung fu fighter which makes one feel like a Kung fu master.

ITEM.name: Heavy Metal Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: Heavy Metal Set for free souls who enjoy traveling wherever.

ITEM.name: Heavy Metal Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Heavy Metal Set for free souls who enjoy traveling wherever.

ITEM.name: Axium Noble Formal Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A formal hat worn by the young men of noble families in Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Axium Noble Tiara (Women)
ITEM.desc: A formal tiara worn by the young women of noble families in Axium Empire.

ITEM.name: Judgement Hair Ornament (Men)
ITEM.desc: A hair ornament for the chosen one who has received the supreme call from the divine being.

ITEM.name: Judgement Hair Ornament (Women)
ITEM.desc: A hair ornament for the chosen one who has received the supreme call from the divine being.

ITEM.name: Carpediem School uniform Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: Student hat at Empires prestigious high school for the children of noble households.

ITEM.name: Carpediem School uniform Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Student hat at Empires prestigious high school for the children of noble households.

ITEM.name: Angel Halo (Women)
ITEM.desc: Halo worn by the young ladies to celebrate the Independence Day of the Empire.

ITEM.name: YoHawk Headband (Men)
ITEM.desc: A traditional head band of the Yohawk clan who have fought vigorously against the merge with the Republic during the foundation of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: YoHawk Headband (Women)
ITEM.desc: A traditional head band of the Yohawk clan who have fought vigorously against the merge with the Republic during the foundation of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Navy Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: A uniform hat worn by the navy army soldiers of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Navy Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: A uniform hat worn by the navy army soldiers of the Republic of Travia.

ITEM.name: Axium High-Class Soulreaper Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Formal wig for the high-class Soulreapers who have been elevated by curing the souls of one thousand people.

ITEM.name: Axium High-Class Soulreaper Wig (Women)
ITEM.desc: Formal wig for the high-class Soulreapers who have been elevated by curing the souls of one thousand people.

ITEM.name: Travia Cryinghawks Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Wig for Travia Cryinghawks, a mercenary clan. The members of this clan value honor and social justice, and are admired by other mercenaries.

ITEM.name: Travia Cryinghawks Wig (Women)
ITEM.desc: Wig for Travia Cryinghawks, a mercenary clan. The members of this clan value honor and social justice, and are admired by other mercenaries.

ITEM.name: Axium Soulreaper Wig (Men)
ITEM.desc: Wig for Axium Soulreaper, the cleric of Republican church who absorbs possessed souls and cures the sick patients.

ITEM.name: Axium Soulreaper Wig (Women)
ITEM.desc: Wig for Axium Soulreaper, the cleric of Republican church who absorbs possessed souls and cures the sick patients.

ITEM.name: Icarus Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Icarus Hat worn by the airplane pilots from Ares who fly across the Astra continent.

ITEM.name: Icarus Hat (Women)
ITEM.desc: Icarus Hat worn by the airplane pilots from Ares who fly across the Astra continent.

ITEM.name: Ninja Hair (Women)
ITEM.desc: Edited by DaFrag.

ITEM.name: Ilya Hair (Women)
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui.

ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui.

ITEM.desc: Royal Guard Hair

ITEM.name: Straw Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Created by Ennui

ITEM.name: Valentine's Hat (Men)
ITEM.desc: Contributed by NirDine

ITEM.name: Palmpow's Shirt Gray
ITEM.desc: Palmpow's brand is iconic because it's trusted by Palmpows! Created by DaFrag.

ITEM.name: Palmpow's Shirt Black
ITEM.desc: Palmpow's brand is iconic because it's trusted by Palmpows! Created by DaFrag.

ITEM.desc: Casual pants for the hipsters of the Hunter Alliance. They provide excellent defense but are suprisingly heavy.

ITEM.name: Shark Teeth Garter Belt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A garter belt of the Empire navys worst enemy,the Shark Teeth, who had power over the Astra ocean. They have made the people of sea tremble with fear with their ferociousness and cruelty.

ITEM.name: Shark Teeth Pants (Men)
ITEM.desc: Pants of the Empire navys worst enemy, the Shark Teeth, who had power over the Astra ocean. They have made the people of sea tremble with fear with their ferociousness and cruelty.

ITEM.name: Black Dragon Clan Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A skirt for members of the Black Dragon Clan, an alliance of merchants and hunters who have risen to fight against the tyranny of the corrupt Establishment.

ITEM.name: Black Dragon Clan Pants (Men)
ITEM.desc: A pants for members of the Black Dragon Clan, an alliance of merchants and hunters who have risen to fight against the tyranny of the corrupt Establishment.

ITEM.name: Crusader Skirt (Women)
ITEM.desc: A set worn by those who dedicated themselves as Knights. These brave Knights swore allegiance to those who shared common beliefs and a common faith.

ITEM.name: Tactical Ninja Garter Belt (Women)

ITEM.name: GM Jacket (Man)
ITEM.desc: To protect the server from devastation! To unite all peoples within our nation! To denounce the evils of truth and love! To extend our reach to the stars above!

ITEM.desc: To protect the server from devastation! To unite all peoples within our nation! To denounce the evils of truth and love! To extend our reach to the stars above!

ITEM.name: Stryker Head (Women)
ITEM.desc: STRYKERS are assassins hired by the The Axium Knights. They are very competent fighters who enjoy mocking their enemies. FADE is one of the most dangerous, yet humane members. Created by Rain and Ennui.

ITEM.desc: STRYKERS are assassins hired by the The Axium Knights. They are very competent fighters who enjoy mocking their enemies. FADE is one of the most dangerous, yet humane members. Created by Rain and Ennui.
